entries.why_used: The user required a new project following the Hunter flow from the local skill directory.
entries.evidence_summary: Read SKILL.md and full-mode orchestration references before creating gate artifacts.
entries.fallback_if_missing: Stop the project and ask for the correct Hunter skill path.

entries.why_used: The project spans research, ideation, specs, implementation, verification, and submission packaging.
entries.evidence_summary: Created persistent plan and notes before the gate work continued.
entries.fallback_if_missing: Use Hunter pipeline files directly as the persistent work tracker.

entries.why_used: Full Hunter tournament mode requires isolated GPT Pro research, ideation, judging, PRD, and UIUX cycles.
entries.evidence_summary: Saved separate R0, I1-I3, J1-J3, PRD, and UIUX prompt and response files with runner state records.
entries.fallback_if_missing: Stop at the Hunter gate and report the browser or GPT Pro session blocker.

entries.why_used: G3 needs anti-template direction for a product UI that cannot read as a generic AI dashboard or landing page.
entries.evidence_summary: Applied the design read, anti-default discipline, component-system choice, and pre-flight constraints to the visual contract.
entries.fallback_if_missing: Block G3 and ask the user to install the required design skill or approve a named fallback.

entries.why_used: G3 needs product-register setup, color strategy, accessibility, motion restraint, and UI audit constraints before build.
entries.evidence_summary: Ran context setup, followed init/product register guidance, wrote PRODUCT.md, and used the palette seed for restrained OKLCH tokens.
entries.fallback_if_missing: Block frontend work and ask the user to install the required impeccable skill or approve a named fallback.

entries.why_used: The PRD reserves a restrained Memory Will wordmark and G3 requires a brand asset pack.
entries.evidence_summary: Read the workflow and design patterns, generated six SVG variants, and selected the will-ring mark for public brand files.
entries.fallback_if_missing: Block brand asset creation and ask the user to install logo-generator or approve a named fallback.

entries.why_used: The locked delivery mode is a combined pitch and product demo video after G4 and G5 are green.
entries.evidence_summary: Rendered the final HyperFrames demo video from real browser footage, measured Mimo narration, captions, and ambient bed; lint/inspect and black/silence checks passed with recorded QA assets.
entries.fallback_if_missing: Block polished video work and ask the user to install HyperFrames or approve a named fallback.

entries.why_used: The entry surface already contains public-facing English copy for the judge's first five seconds.
entries.evidence_summary: Reviewed hero, CTA, receipt, and state labels for filler phrases, formulaic structures, hype, em dashes, and vague claims.
entries.fallback_if_missing: Block public copy shipping and ask the user to install stop-slop or approve a named fallback.

entries.why_used: The project language is English and the current hero copy must sound like product UI, not generated prose.
entries.evidence_summary: Checked current copy for promotional language, rule-of-three rhythm, passive voice, curly quotes, title-case excess, and chatbot phrasing.
entries.fallback_if_missing: Block public English copy shipping and ask the user to install humanizer or approve a named fallback.

entries.why_used: G6 public README and submission copy must avoid hype, filler, formulaic AI structures, and unsupported claims.
entries.evidence_summary: Reviewed updated README and submission draft for direct product copy, unsupported claims, formulaic hype, stale URLs, and AI-writing tells after final deck/video paths changed.
entries.fallback_if_missing: Block G6 human copy and ask for the required skill or explicit fallback.

entries.why_used: The public package is English, so Hunter requires the English humanizer pass before finalizing README and submission copy.
entries.evidence_summary: Checked updated package copy for promotional language, inflated significance, rule-of-three pressure, passive voice, vague attribution, and stale artifact claims.
entries.fallback_if_missing: Block public English copy shipping and ask the user to install humanizer or approve a named fallback.

entries.why_used: Hunter requires ppt-master before deck work. The skill was read to verify its blocking workflow before any deck artifact is created.
entries.evidence_summary: Generated the final 6-slide ppt-master deck, reran svg_quality_checker.py with 6/6 pass, split 6 speaker-note pages, finalized SVGs, and exported native PPTX plus SVG reference.
entries.fallback_if_missing: Do not create the deck; ask the user to install ppt-master or approve a named fallback.
